name: cloud-platforms
prompt: Clean cloud platform comparison. White background. Three columns with headers "Google Cloud" | "AWS" | "Azure" in charcoal (#1c1c1d). Below each, 5 small grey text items like "BigQuery", "S3", "Cosmos DB" etc. Simple 1px grey borders between columns. Single ember accent (#D95B43) dot next to "BigQuery". Minimal Inter font. No logos, just text. Generous spacing. Flat design aesthetic.
